episodes.title: ‘Compromised by Epstein Files’: Rahul Gandhi launches a fresh attack on PM Modi
episodes.description:
Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi, speaking at the Samvidhan Sammelan, launched a significant critique of Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s administration. Mr. Gandhi alleged that the Prime Minister and Union Minister Hardeep Puri have been "compromised" by references in the Epstein files, affecting India's strategic trade deals with the US. He further detailed the link between corporate interests and government policy, while reiterating the demand for a Caste Census to ensure constitutional representation.
